LanguageData.SD_Letter_ChildhoodStarted_Text:
{0} opened her eyes, filled with confusion and curiosity.

"Who... who am I?"

The story begins. Designate a guardian to help the little girl find her place in the colony.
LanguageData.SD_Letter_YouthStarted_Text:
{0} has grown. Her eyes are no longer as naive as in childhood, yet still carry innocence.

She seems to understand more about the world, but cannot yet articulate her inner feelings.

Sync Rate: {1}%
Chaos Level: {2}%
LanguageData.SD_FlightToggleDesc: Toggle flight mode on or off.
LanguageData.SD_Witch_Transform_Desc: Switch to witch form, witch factor growth accelerates.
LanguageData.SD_Witch_CancelTransform_Desc: Cancel witch form and return to normal state.
LanguageData.SD_Witch_SuppressDesc: Suppress the berserk witch and reset witch factor.
LanguageData.SD_Witch_Berserk: {0}'s witch factor is out of control! She has entered berserk state!
LanguageData.SD_Witch_CannotToggle_Berserk: Cannot toggle form while berserk. Suppression required!
LanguageData.SD_Witch_Suppressed: {0} has been suppressed. Witch factor reset.
LanguageData.SD_Witch_NoSuppressor: No available colonist to perform suppression.
LanguageData.SD_BodyWeapon_CannotUse: {0} cannot use body weapon right now
